description: Create a content slide titled '2024 in retrospect' with a two-column layout: a left sidebar with survey prompt and base note, and a right-side horizontal stacked bar chart comparing agree vs disagree for two statements with 2023 agree benchmarks.

sidebar.body:
Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

Base: 23,721 online adults under the age of 75 across 33 countries, interviewed 25 October - 8 November 2024.

labels: 2024 was a bad year for my country
2024 was a bad year for me and my family
main.title: Global averages
